title: writing-polish single eval record (JSONL line)
description: One line per polish/audit session in evals/*.jsonl; also the line format produced by scan-ai-taste.sh --log-to <path>.

model.description: Main session model id at the time of run, e.g., claude-opus-4-7-1m or claude-sonnet-4-6

protocol.description: Which polish protocol produced this record; used for cross-version comparison. v6.1 = 0-3 scale + L3 mandatory + L2 trace-file留痕；v8.0 = per-use 自然语言反馈 + 粗判（不打数值分），scan 软信号下沉 reviewer

genre.description: v8.0 起对齐 constitution §0 G1-G8 精确名串（G1-G8 + 其他）

l2_self_judge_scores.description: Main-session self-judge result (v6.1+: read from .writing-polish-trace/*.json); absent for audit-only runs or when L2 abstained (then L3 fallback ran instead)

l3_reviewer_outputs.description: Conforms to reviewer-output.schema.json; present when L3 multi-reviewer was spawned

rules_not_covered_but_feels_off.description: Aggregated from L2 self-judge + L3 reviewers; v6.1 evolution-queue input
